title: Otis Classic Small Glass Jars with Lids – Set of 12 Mini Glass Bottles with Corks for Halloween Decorations Fall Décor Wedding & Party Favors, Halloween DIY Crafts, Potions, Spices & Candy, 3.4 oz
description:
About this item
Halloween Versatile: Great for storing anything from milk to magic spells, our mini glass jars with cork lids are perfect for displaying all sorts of DIY crafts.
Wide Neck: Our mini jars have convenient 30mm diameter necks, allowing for fuss-free filling of items such as candy or tiny flowers.
Heavy Duty: Our glass jars with cork are made with 3mm premium quality glass and are as durable as they are decorative.
Wedding Favors: Our personalizable small jars make beautiful wedding decorations that double as treasured keepsakes.
Bonus: Our corked mini jars include 20 brown paper labels and a big bundle of string, so you can add your own personalized touch to every bottle!
› See more product details
reviews_5s:
The cuteness factor on these bottles is worth the purchase. 😂. They look good, function well. I used them to hold homemade coffee creamer, at a class I was demonstrating. Made my recipe taste look pretty…Plan to use for other homemade gifts. Can use for a tiny vase. Loved them!Shipped and arrived on time, was exactly as advertised. Super cute bottles that will work perfectly.To say I love these glass jars would be an understatement. I have used them for so many different things. I put my kitchen spices in them, I made team gifts with them and use them as part of a decorative display. They are high quality, beautiful to look at and at a great price. Great for any craft project or to help stay organized in your sewing room. I highly recommend these little glass jars!These came all in tact with loose fitting cork lids. Which is fine, these are all going to be standing upright on a shelf, but if I were to use these as party favors I'd maybe hot glue the tops to the jar so they'd stay closed. Otherwise these are great. Thick glass. Each one had a cork. Perfect size for a mini apothecary gift I'm making for my friend.Play Video
These jars are the perfect size for my party favors. They are very good quality, the glass is clear and not streaky, and they are super cute with the cork top.I take medications - lots of medications - and bought these jars to organize my pills. Most pill organizers are too small to hold all my pills.. For that reason, I wish that I could get 14 jars, rather than 12 so that I have two for each day of the week for my morning and evening pills. These jars are versitile. They can be used for pills, craft items, spices, and more. The mouths are wide enough for me to put even the largest of pills in, even though the jars are small. They are thick enough so as not to break easily, without being so thick that they are heavy, The corks are easy to put in and take out of the mouths of the jars - which is important for me as my hands are becoming arthritic. I noticed complaints about the corks in other reviews. Maybe they improved the design or are using a differnt factory that produces them accurately? I don'y know, but I do know mine work great - even with stiff, painful hands. The bottles come in a divided box with one slot for reach jar, making it easy to keep them organized if needed. The jars are quite sturdy and thick enough that they will not easily break, without being so thick as to make them heavy. Because the jars come with cute little labels and string, I was able to lable the jars without resorting to sticky labels. Overall, these jars are cute and fun, yet very practical.This is the perfect party favor for my daughters cheshire cat/Alice in wonderland themed birthday party. The cork top fits snug into place, I did not have to worry about it falling out and the candy spilling everywhere. The tags and string are nice and durable for a cute touch to these glass bottles. The bottles come individually wrapped in bubble wrap to keep them extra safe, all of the bottles and corks were in great condition. Delivery was fast. I would highly recommend these bottles, great for the price.These jars are perfect in every way. They are very efficient for DIY crafts. The glass is of high quality, clear without streaks. The jars are very aethestically appealing. Perfect size also. Recommend.Filled with gem stones this works well for our rock club to sell little stones. Displayed wellThese were perfect for my wife’s crafts
reviews_1s:
Bottles were filthy when they arrived. I always wash them first but these looked like they sat in a dusty warehouse for years. This was not the case when I first purchased them. I’ll be looking for another supplietSadly a total waste of money. The checks are purely decorative and do NOT fit properly. When you push the cork in, it immediately pops back up and teeters in place if you pick up, touch or move bottle in anyway at all. Useless for spices. Useless if you are using it for a gift you expect anyone to carry or touch. Absolutely no practical use, ornamental ONLY.

Unfortunately I unpacked them, washed, and applied a label to one before I realized.

Between the always late deliveries, the increasingly stricter return rules and the constant product fails on arrival, think I might be done w Amazon for all but the most basic purchases. Ultimately faster, cheaper, and better quality to just go to a storeJuly 2020:
This was a complete waste of time and money. I spent the entire day bottling up and labeling my herbs and when I went to put them away, the corks came out immediately. I tried everything. I jammed the cork against the wall and pushed with all of my weight...didn't matter, cork came right out. My bad for doing all that work before even making sure the corks fit securely, but then again why would they not fit securely??? If you are looking for something that needs to be secured with a top, this is NOT that item. Look elsewhere! I'm extremely disappointed and now have to find new jars. I see I'm not the only one complaining about this issue, so maybe the company should address this issue.I made several bath salts as gifts but had to tape down the cork lids to the jar because they would not stay secure. Too bad because the jars are really cute. It was too late to purchase new jars so my money was wasted for its purpose. I'll have to use these jars for flowers or something else that doesn't need the cork lids.I bought these jars to make candles. One of the questions answered by the seller on this listing asked if they were safe for that purpose and the seller said they were. However, the candle broke and glass flew off while burning. I definitely won’t be purchasing these (or any other jars from this seller) again!The cork on this bottle does not stay sealed tight and keeps popping off.Jars look super cute but are pretty much worthless for anything you don’t want to spill. They are just for looks. Cork does not stay in at all- like not even a little. It just sits on top of the jar. Don’t put anything that can spill or evaporate. I made sugar scrubs and the water/oils evaporated- didn’t care about spilling because they are in the shower. Would not buy again.I ordered because twine and labels were included. There are no labels.Luckily it was on a trivet and on a hard service. When candle melted down the jar split in 2 evidently. Could have started a fire so if I chose to use the remaining 11 they won't be for gifts and will not leave the room with candle burningBox was in perfect condition but many jars were broken
